texto: What's important to remember is that every customer interaction should be treated like a first impression. Until your on-demand customer becomes a loyal follower, he's probably already forgotten what his last touch was, so you'd better wow him or her this time. Don't skimp and don't cut corners when it comes to the external touches your brand makes. From experience I can tell you that you'll pay a much bigger price in customer retention if you go cheap when it comes to customer outreach and service.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Gabriel Aluisy: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “What's important to remember is that every customer interaction should be treated like a first im…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que negocios, brand, marketing pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de marketing.
